channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Tank Dell out for season with dislocated knee, torn ACL. Texans claim Diontae Johnson off waivers
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Houston Texans receiver Tank Dell will miss the remainder of the season after dislocating a knee and tearing an ACL in a loss to Kansas City on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Cavs' Jarrett Allen stuns fans with backward halfcourt shot before game
item.description: Cleveland Cavaliers star Jarrett Allen wowed the crowd at the Rocket Mortgage Fieldhouse on Monday night ahead of the game against the Utah Jazz
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sean Manaea to re-sign with Mets for $75 million over 3 years, AP source says
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Sean Manaea is set to return to the New York Mets on a $75 million, three-year contract, a person familiar with the agreement told The Associated Press. The person spoke to the AP on condition of anonymity Monday because the deal was subject to a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Houston Astros welcome 1B Christian Walker to team; say negotiations with Bregman stalled
item.description: The Astros welcomed first baseman Christian Walker to the team in one of two moves that almost certainly marks the end of Alex Bregman’s time in Houston.
item.dc:creator: Kristie Rieken, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: NCAA appealing Pavia injunction as D-I board grants waiver to former JUCO players
item.description: The NCAA appealed Monday the preliminary injunction granted by a U.S. federal judge giving Diego Pavia another year of eligibility even as the organization's Division I board of directors granted a waiver allowing athletes in a similar situation as the Vanderbilt quarterback to play in 2025-26.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jets' Aaron Rodgers reveals he has a girlfriend after mentioning exes in docuseries
item.description: New York Jets star quarterback Aaron Rodgers revealed he has a girlfriend during his latest appearance on ESPN's "The Pat McAfee Show.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bucs with Bowles: Mistakes cost Bucs a game and their division lead
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers four-game winning streak came to an end Sunday night with a 26-24 loss to the Dallas Cowboys.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: No. 1 Oregon and No. 8 Ohio State gear up for rematch of thriller won by Ducks
item.description: Oregon and Ohio State have already produced one heck of a game this season. Now, the top-seeded Ducks (13-0) and No. 8 Buckeyes (11-2) are gearing up for a rematch more than 10 weeks later in a College Football Playoff quarterfinal game at the Rose Bowl on New Year's Day.
item.dc:creator: JOHN ZENOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Masters gets 10 more players from top 50 in the world ranking. Glover narrowly gets in
item.description: Lucas Glover held down the 50th spot in the final world ranking of the year, making him one of 10 players who will be added to the invitation list to play in the Masters. The field has eight more players than it did at this time a year ago.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: East Bay’s Sabrina Ionescu joins Unrivaled 3-on-3 league
item.description: Sabrina Ionescu won a WNBA title and an Olympic gold medal in 2024, will join new league that will start play in January
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Washington Mystics hire Jamila Wideman as general manager, Sydney Johnson as coach
item.description: The Washington Mystics hired Jamila Wideman as the franchise's new general manager and Sydney Johnson as the team's coach on Monday. Wideman joins the Mystics after spending six years at the NBA league office, where she most recently served as senior vice president of player development.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: USC up to No. 4 in women's AP Top 25 after win over UConn. UCLA, South Carolina, Notre Dame stay 1-3
item.description: Southern California jumped to No. 4 in The Associated Press women's college basketball poll on Monday after edging UConn. The Trojans moved up three spots in the AP Top 25 after beating the then-No. 4 Huskies 72-70 on Saturday night in a rematch of last season's Elite Eight game that UConn won.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Matt Petgrave, involved in play that led to Adam Johnson's death, asks for donations for legal costs
item.description: Hockey player Matt Petgrave has called the death of Adam Johnson “a tragic accident” in a public appeal for donations to his legal costs amid a police investigation.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Cowboys coach Mike McCarthy shares jubilant embrace with owner Jerry Jones amid contract drama
item.description: Cowboys head coach Mike McCarthy and owner Jerry Jones shared a warm embrace in the locker room after a win over the Buccaneers as the final season of McCarthy's contract nears an end.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mickey, Minnie, Goofy and Wemby: Spurs-Knicks Christmas game is also an animated one at Disney World
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — There's a Christmas Day basketball game at Walt Disney World, featuring Mickey, Minnie, Goofy and Wemby. An animated game, anyway.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aggies bounce back with 75-68 win over St. Mary's
item.description: MORAGA, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off its first loss of the season, the Utah State men’s basketball (11-1, 1-0 MW) got back in the win column Sunday night, closing out non-conference play with a 75-68 win over Saint Mary’s at the UCU Pavilion in Moraga.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Nick Saban corrects Shane Gillis after comedian jokes coach oversaw cheating during storied Alabama tenure
item.description: The seven-time national championship coach did not take kindly to the suggestion or even joke that Alabama players received impermissible benefits under his watch.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sam Darnold's remarkable TD pass to Justin Jefferson helps Vikings edge Seahawks
item.description: Sam Darnold threw three touchdown passes, including two to Justin Jefferson, as the Minnesota Vikings topped the Seattle Seahawks on Sunday, 27-24.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bengals fan wins entire stadium free pizza as Cincinnati keeps playoff hopes alive with win over Browns
item.description: Cincinnati Bengals fans walked away from Sunday's game with a win and, thanks to one lucky fan, a slice of free pizza.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: High-scoring Lions' fast start too much for Bears, Chicago loses 9th in a row
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears spotted the Detroit Lions an early 20-0 lead and despite catching their groove midway through the game, Chicago came up short for the second time this season against Detroit.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bears vs. Lions: Injuries, inactives and key matchups for Sunday's game at Soldier Field
item.description: UPDATE: The Bears and Lions have announced their inactives for Sunday's game. See INJURY REPORT below. CHICAGO — The Bears are "playing out the string," as they say, eliminated from NFL playoff contention with three games still left to play this season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Tatum scores a season-high 43 to go with 16 rebounds, 10 assist in Celtics 123-98 win over Bulls
item.description: Jayson Tatum scored a season-high 43 points, grabbed 16 rebounds and dished out 10 assists for his third career triple-double and the Boston Celtics beat the Chicago Bulls 123-98 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Flames get goals from 6 players in a 6-4 victory over the Blackhawks
item.description: Jonathan Huberdeau, Connor Zary, Blake Coleman, and Matt Coronato each had a goal and an assist as the Calgary Flames beat the Chicago Blackhawks 6-4 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz win back-to-back games for first time this season
item.description: BROOKLYN, N.Y. (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time since April, the Utah Jazz are on a winning streak. Lauri Markkanen scored 21 points, Collin Sexton and Svi Mykhailiuk each had 18 points, and the Utah Jazz beat the Brooklyn Nets 105-94 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Northwestern demolishes DePaul in crosstown showdown
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. (WGN) — An early blitz on the offensive end and playmaking down the stretch from Brooks Barnhizer and Nick Martinelli helped seal a convincing win for Northwestern over DePaul in the yearly crosstown showdown between the two programs.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Rickey Henderson, MLB's all-time stolen base leader, dies at 65
item.description: Rickey Henderson, the man who changed Major League Baseball with his blazing, unbeatable speed, has died, the league confirmed. The all-time MLB leader in stolen bases and one of the games greatest leadoff hitters died in Oakland on Friday after a bout with pneumonia, TMZ reports.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Guenther scores twice as Utah HC beats Minnesota, 2-1
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is in seventh heaven right about now. Dylan Guenther scored twice, including the game-winner at 10:01 of the third period, as Utah ran its road winning streak to seven in a row Friday night with a hard-fought 2-1 victory over the Minnesota Wild.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 1 dead in small plane crash near home of NFL player Dion Dawkins
item.description: One person died in a small plane crash Thursday morning close to the house of Buffalo Bills offensive lineman Dion Dawkins, police said.
item.dc:creator: Aidan Joly, WFLA, NBC

item.title: All eyes on Raymond James as Gasparilla Bowl kicks off Friday
item.description: When you hear the word "Gasparilla," you may think of pirates or pirate invasions. But on Friday, think football.
item.dc:creator: Alessandra Young, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bulls beat Celtics 117-108 in Boston
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Celtics forward Jaylen Brown took issue with back-to-back technical fouls called on coach Joe Mazzulla and himself late in the fourth quarter of Boston’s 117-108 loss to the Chicago Bulls on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC erases two-goal deficit to stun Vancouver
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Mikhail Sergachev scored with 12 seconds left in overtime, as the Utah Hockey Club stormed back from a 2-0 deficit in the third period to beat the Vanouver Canucks and end a five-game home losing streak, 3-2.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: American competitive eater Joey Chestnut named Holiday Bowl Parade Grand Marshall
item.description: World-famous competitive eater Joey Chestnut has been chosen as the 2024 DIRECTV Holiday Bowl "Chief Eggnog Official." He will also serve as the Grand Marshal of the Holiday Bowl Parade.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: NCAA president says there are 'less than 10' transgender athletes in college sports
item.description: NCAA President Charlie Baker told a Senate panel that there are fewer than 10 transgender athletes he is aware of who currently compete in college sports, pouring cold water on an issue Republicans have said is a nationwide problem and one that is increasingly fraught territory for Democrats.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, Fox 5

item.title: As Caleb Williams gains experience, Bears must find meaning in final 3 games of dismal 2024 season
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. (AP) — The Chicago Bears continue to get the same result regardless of how they approach the assignment. Quarterback Caleb Williams looked physically and mentally beaten at the end of Monday night’s 30-12 loss to the Minnesota Vikings, the eighth straight Bears defeat.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Government funding deal opens door to move Washington Commanders stadium to DC
item.description: The Washington Commanders could soon be kicking off in the heart of the nation’s capital. The government funding deal unveiled by congressional negotiators Tuesday paved the way for moving the Commanders' stadium from Maryland to Washington, D.C.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, NewsNation

item.title: Former Dodgers MVP heading to New York Yankees: report
item.description: The New York Yankees agreed to acquire outfielder Cody Bellinger from the Chicago Cubs on Tuesday for right-hander Cody Poteet, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press. The person spoke to the AP on condition of anonymity because the trade had not been announced.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: NBA unveils new All-Star format featuring four-team tournament
item.description: The NBA 's All-Star Game is going to be an All-Star tournament this season, with the league announcing on Tuesday that it has finalized plans to use a different format for the upcoming midseason showcase in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9
